summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hoptym RMS module backend APIs and frontend integration. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all key features including KPIs display, strategy selection, weights sliders, autopilot toggle, and recalculate functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/config returns default config with strategy_config, weight_config, connector_config
Backend: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/kpis returns KPI data (revpar, adr, occupancy_pct, total_revenue)
Backend: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/strategy returns 4 strategies (conservative, balanced, aggressive, dynamic)
Backend: PUT /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/strategy updates active strategy successfully
Backend: PUT /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/strategy updates autopilot settings (enabled, confidence_threshold)
Backend: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/weights returns 5 weight factors summing to 100%
Backend: PUT /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/weights updates weight factors
Backend: PUT /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/weights validates sum equals 100 (returns 400 if not)
Backend: POST /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/engine/run executes pricing engine and generates recommendations
Backend: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/recommendations returns generated recommendations
Backend: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/calendar returns pricing calendar with 90 days
Backend: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/connectors/status returns 5 connector statuses (PMS, Channel Manager, Booking Engine, Lighthouse, D-EDGE)
Backend: Full workflow integration test (config -> strategy -> engine -> recommendations -> calendar)
Frontend: Login with admin@flowtym.com / admin123 works
Frontend: Hoptym navigation link visible and navigates to /rms
Frontend: RMS module loads with internal navbar (Revenue, Intelligence, Configuration tabs)
Frontend: KPI grid displays values (€142.50 RevPAR, €189.00 ADR, 75.4% Occupation, €28,450 Revenue)
Frontend: Strategy page shows 4 strategy cards (Conservateur, Équilibré, Agressif, Dynamique)
Frontend: Autopilot page shows toggle and stats (12 adjustments, +€3,450 impact, 94.2% precision)
Frontend: Weights page shows 5 sliders totaling 100%
Frontend: Recalculate button works
seed_data_creation: RMS module auto-creates default config when first accessed for a hotel_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hoptym RMS module fully tested and working. Backend APIs at /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/* are all functional. Frontend at /rms displays data from backend correctly. Key data-testid attributes: rms-module, rms-navbar, kpi-grid, strategy-grid, autopilot-toggle, nav-tab-revenue, nav-tab-intelligence, nav-tab-config, subnav-strategy, subnav-autopilot, subnav-weights, btn-recalculate. MOCKED APIs: Lighthouse and D-EDGE connectors generate realistic fake data but don't connect to real services.

mocked_apis_list: Lighthouse API (competitor rates, market demand) - /app/backend/rms/integrations/lighthouse.py - generates realistic mock data
D-EDGE API (channel performance, rate parity) - /app/backend/rms/integrations/dedge.py - generates realistic mock data
Internal Flowtym connectors (PMS, Channel Manager, Booking Engine) - fall back to mock data if real data not available

backend_apis.kpis: GET /api/rms/hotels/{hotel_id}/kpis - returns current KPIs and targets

frontend_features.navigation: Hoptym link in main nav, internal tabs (Revenue, Intelligence, Configuration)
frontend_features.kpi_display: 4 KPI cards with values and change percentages
frontend_features.strategy_selection: 4 strategy cards, selection persists to backend
